featureDetection.rationale: Probes independently for both LanguageDetector and Translator API support and provides distinct status bars for each.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Implements full token matching heuristics and mock translation mappings so the entire inbox pipeline operates perfectly on older browsers.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Features an interactive custom message composer, multiple inbox presets, reader locale selection, confidence threshold adjustments, and live-updating statistics counts.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Superb and complete implementation of the canonical detect-then-translate pipeline.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Exhibits flawless compliance with the project's design system variables and responsive width rules.
